debug_info.goal:
x y z w : ℕ
ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z
hw : 0 ≤ w
h0 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑x = 24
h1 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑y = 40
h2 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = 12
⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
have hx : 1 < (x : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.1
  have hy : 1 < (y : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.2.1
  have hz : 1 < (z : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.2.2
  have hxpos : 0 < Real.log x := Real.log_pos hx
  have hypos : 0 < Real.log y := Real.log_pos hy
  have hzpos : 0 < Real.log z := Real.log_pos hz
  have hxyz : Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by
    rw [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul] <;> positivity
  rw [hxyz] at h2
  field_simp at h0 h1 h2 ⊢
  linear_combination (3 * Real.log ↑z / 2) * h0 + (9 * Real.log ↑z / 10) * h1 - (6 * Real.log ↑z) * h2
